privileged_info_summary: OpenMaint is a legitimate facility management system built on the CMDBuild platform. The task requires creation of a SolarPanel class with five attributes (PanelCapacityKW as Decimal, InstallationDate as Date, Manufacturer as String, InverterType as String, PanelCount as Integer)—all types are supported by CMDBuild. Three solar panel records must be created with data from a synthetic specification file. The manufacturers mentioned (SunPower, Canadian Solar, LONGi Green Energy) are all real companies. All inverter models specified (SMA Sunny Tripower 15000TL, Fronius Symo 20.0-3-M, Huawei SUN2000-8KTL-M1) are real products. The capacity values are realistic: record 1 has 150 kW across 42 panels (avg 3.57 kW/panel), record 2 has 200 kW across 56 panels (avg 3.57 kW/panel), and record 3 has 75.5 kW across 22 panels (avg 3.43 kW/panel)—all within typical modern solar panel specifications of 350-600W per panel. Installation dates are specified as 2025-01-15, 2025-02-20, and 2025-03-10, all in the past relative to current date (2026-03-08). The specification data is synthetic, created programmatically by the task setup script, not from external sources.
